theme_name: Editorial Code (Swiss Brutalist + High Fashion Tech)
description: An Awwwards-caliber, high-contrast design merging the elegance of editorial layouts with the raw, functional aesthetic of code terminals. Utilizes massive negative space, sharp 1px borders, and striking typography pairings.

rules: No generic defaults like Inter or Roboto for headings.
Use Playfair Display for dramatic, large scale headings (often mixing italic for key words).
Use JetBrains Mono for all overlines, small labels, numbers (01, 02), and technical specs.
Use Outfit for readable body paragraphs.
Headlines MUST be tight (leading-none, tracking-tight). Mono labels MUST be loose (tracking-[0.2em]).
DO NOT USE GRADIENTS. Stick to solid colors.
Use Electric Vermilion (#FF4500) strictly for primary actions, hover highlights, and kinetic accents.
Use stark monochrome for 95% of the UI to let the typography and images breathe.
Use 2x-3x normal padding (py-24 or py-32 for sections).
Embrace asymmetry. Do not center everything. Align to stark grid lines.
Use 1px solid borders (border-border) to define structural bento grids and list items.
Containers must have internal padding (p-8 to p-12) if they have borders.

hero.instructions: Massive typography masked text reveal using framer-motion (line-by-line slide up). A floating tech/code image behind the text with parallax effect.

marquee.instructions: Slow, smooth drift. Monospace font. Items separated by '//' or '*'. E.g., 'JAVA // DSA // SYSTEM DESIGN'.

manifesto_chapters.instructions: Instead of standard cards, use a massive vertical list for courses. E.g., '01' (mono) 'JAVA MASTERY' (serif). 1px border bottom for each. On hover, reveal a floating image tied to the cursor (if possible) or simply shift the text right (translate-x-4) via framer-motion.

mentors.instructions: High-contrast, grayscale images clipped into tall rectangles. On hover, apply a slight scale up inside the hidden overflow and reveal the name/title in a strict mono font block.

contact_form.instructions: Do not use standard boxed inputs. Use bare inputs with only a bottom border (border-b). Label sits above in monospace. Focus state turns the bottom border to the Accent color.

whatsapp_fab.instructions: Fixed bottom-right pill. Black or Accent color, crisp shadow. Hover scales up.

rules: Use framer-motion for all scroll reveals (staggered fade-up, masked text reveals).
Use lenis for smooth, momentum-based scrolling.
Hover states must be purposeful (e.g., text color changes to accent, subtle transforms).
No bouncy/springy animations. Keep it linear/ease-out, strict and professional.

images.usage_rules: No placeholder images. Use the provided Unsplash URLs. Treat images with slight grain or stark contrast where possible. Clip them into sharp geometrical frames.

accessibility.testing: All interactive elements (buttons, links, form inputs) MUST include data-testid attribute in kebab-case. E.g., data-testid='contact-submit-button'.
accessibility.contrast: Ensure pure black/white high contrast. Do not use transparent text or inaccessible grays.
accessibility.focus: Custom focus rings (ring-1 ring-offset-2 ring-accent) on all interactables.

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Avoid 'AI slop' aesthetics (purple gradients, generic centered layouts).
Use solid background colors (Dark or Light theme). DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Create depth through layered design elements and z-index hierarchy.
Do NOT apply universal transitions (e.g., transition: all). Target specific properties like opacity, transform.
Do NOT center align the app container (.App { text-align: center; }). It disrupts reading flow.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
For the codebase: It is React JS (not TS). Avoid TypeScript syntaxes.
Ensure all Shadcn components (if used) are stripped of their default 'Vercel' look and styled to match the Editorial Code theme (sharp corners, no soft shadows, 1px borders).
Use lucide-react for icons. Use sonner for toasts.
Implement Lenis for smooth scrolling in the App layout.
